_meta.note: Verification ledger for every auto rate atom. Integrity SLA: each atom must be re-verified against a real source at least every 30 days. A snapshot of each value is stored; if index.html later differs, the atom is DRIFTED and must be re-verified. Update dates only via `audit_rates.py --mark`/`--mark-all` after an actual source check.

sources.state_avg: ValuePenguin 'Car Insurance Rates by State' (full-coverage annual), pub 2026-06-16 — https://www.valuepenguin.com/car-insurance-by-state
sources.cs_grade: NAIC complaint index — PENDING verification (next batch)
sources.modeled: carrier base / state & metro offsets / sens are MODELED; verify relative ordering vs Insurify/MoneyGeek/Bankrate carrier rankings
